notes: Adds universal Size / Scale detail support for all species records, not only mushrooms.
Renders existing size, field_measurements, measurements, and common cap/stem/plant-part measurement fields in a dedicated detail-page block.
Supports future worker-added part-level measurements for leaves, flowers, fruit, berries, nuts, cones, roots, stalks, thallus, brackets, shelves, and other ID-relevant structures.
Moves mushroom measurements into the same Size / Scale detail block to avoid burying size inside the identification text.
No species size data was bulk-added in this package; this is foundation UI/model support for upcoming sourced size-data batches.
